title: Add beskid_tracker submodule, repo manifests, and hub UI bootstrap

source.subject: feat(superrepo): add beskid_tracker submodule, repo manifests, and Beskid hub UI.

body:
Registers `beskid_tracker` as a submodule, adds `manifests/default.xml` (and variants) for multi-repo checkout, and introduces initial `beskid-hub` / docs-ui wiring in the superrepo before the `beskid_web_common` extraction.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`6438ae8`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/6438ae8)
- **Subject:** feat(superrepo): add beskid_tracker submodule, repo manifests, and Beskid hub UI.
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`

## What shipped

Registers `beskid_tracker` as a submodule, adds `manifests/default.xml` (and variants) for multi-repo checkout, and introduces initial `beskid-hub` / docs-ui wiring in the superrepo before the `beskid_web_common` extraction.
